events.name: Organization Created
events.description: A new Organization was created. `has_parent` = true means the row was created as a child (nesting entitled + used).

events.name: Organization Default Changed
events.description: The tenant's is_default Organization was flipped. Critical for troubleshooting reports because most downstream tools default their filters to the default org.

events.name: Organization Reparented
events.description: An Organization was moved to a different parent. `descendant_count` measures blast radius (how many rows had their tree_path recomputed). Bulk-cascading updates warrant a follow-up 'org restructuring detected' outreach from CS.

events.name: Organization Status Changed
events.description: Status transitioned. `to_status=paused` while descendants active is a churn signal.

events.name: Organization Branding Updated
events.description: logo_url / primary_color / secondary_color / description changed. Only fires when the tenant holds `organization_branding` entitlement.

events.name: Organization Slot Consumed
events.description: Fires when `organization_slot` entitlement consumption crosses 50 / 75 / 90 / 100 %. Drives upsell CTAs.

events.name: Organization Nesting Refused
events.description: A parent_id set was refused because the tenant lacks `organization_hierarchy`. Strong upsell signal — the tenant tried to nest.
